default_count.hint: The bundled dice app supports 1 to 6 dice.

max_count.description: Maximum dice count accepted by commands
max_count.hint: Values above 6 are capped because the bundled UI only supports up to 6 dice.

browser.description: Optional Chromium, Chrome, or Edge executable path
browser.hint: Leave empty to auto-detect from common paths and browser-related environment variables.

width.description: Browser viewport width used for rendering

height.description: Browser viewport height used for rendering
